title: Subprocess dispatch stays in pi-workflows
context: pi --mode json subprocess invocation is workflow-specific orchestration, not agent infrastructure. Extracting it into jit-agents would conflate the agent abstraction with workflow-step execution mechanics.
decision: pi --mode json subprocess invocation stays in pi-workflows' dispatch.ts. Does not move to jit-agents.
consequences: Step executors that use subprocess dispatch continue to call dispatch.ts directly
jit-agents owns only in-process dispatch (executeAgent per DEC-0004)
